devices.name: R1
devices.script:
enable
configure terminal

interface loopback 1
 ip address 192.168.30.1 255.255.255.255
 ipv6 address fe80::1 link-local
 ipv6 address 192:168:30:1::1/64

interface range e0/0-1
 ip ospf network point-to-point

router ospf 10
 network 30.30.30.0 0.0.0.255 area 0
 network 31.31.31.1 0.0.0.0 area 0
 network 31.31.31.5 0.0.0.0 area 0
 network 192.168.30.1 0.0.0.0 area 0

router bgp 3030
 neighbor 192.168.30.2 remote-as 3030
 neighbor 192.168.30.2 update-source loopback 1
 neighbor 192.168.30.3 remote-as 3030
 neighbor 192.168.30.3 update-source loopback 1

do show ip bgp summary

devices.name: R2
devices.script:
enable
configure terminal

interface loopback 1
 ip address 192.168.30.2 255.255.255.255
 ipv6 address fe80::2 link-local
 ipv6 address 192:168:30:2::1/64

interface range e0/0,e0/2
 ip ospf network point-to-point

router ospf 10
 network 31.31.31.2 0.0.0.0 area 0
 network 31.31.31.10 0.0.0.0 area 0
 network 192.168.30.2 0.0.0.0 area 0

router bgp 3030
 neighbor 192.168.30.1 remote-as 3030
 neighbor 192.168.30.1 update-source loopback 1
 neighbor 192.168.30.3 remote-as 3030
 neighbor 192.168.30.3 update-source loopback 1
 neighbor 40.40.40.2 remote-as 1111

do show ip bgp summary

devices.name: R9
devices.script:
enable
configure terminal

router bgp 2020
 neighbor 60.60.60.1 remote-as 1212

router eigrp EIGRP100
 address-family ipv4 autonomous-system 100
 network 10.10.10.1 0.0.0.0
 network 21.21.21.2 0.0.0.0
 network 21.21.21.17 0.0.0.0

 neighbor 10.10.10.4 remote-as 2020

 neighbor 10.10.10.5 remote-as 2020
 neighbor 10.10.10.5 update-source loopback 1

send_all_scripts.name: Disable CDP
send_all_scripts.script:
enable
configure terminal
no cdp run

send_all_scripts.name: BGP summary
send_all_scripts.script:
enable
configure terminal
do show ip bgp summary
